Atty. GREGORY SCHAFFER, Esq. (via Zoom videoconference) of The Swanson Law Group (tel: 818-852-7300) for the Plaintiff.
Atty. ALLISON HOWARD, Esq. of Bremer Whyte Brown & O'Meara LLP (tel: 949-221-1000) for Defendant Jimmy Estevez.
Atty. COLIN WALSHOK, Esq. (via Zoom videoconference) of Wingert Grebing Brubaker & walshok LLP (tel: 619-232-8151) for Defendant Uber Technologies, Inc.; Rasier, LLC; and Rasier-CA, LLC.
Atty. DAVE BURNETT, Esq. (via Zoom videoconference) of Resnick & Louis, P.C. (tel: 415-651-3363) for Defendant Adelaida Estevez.

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF MARCIAL GONZALEZ's Motion For Sanctions, Including Terminating, Issue And Or Monetary Sanctions Against Defendants Jimmy Estevez And Adelaida Estevez.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court takes the matter under submission.
